# Devoteo

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `atlas`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed atlas`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 38.4% land, 61.6% ocean, 9 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Savanna**, 15 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 27 regions, 16 settlements, 2 realms
- **Capital:** Bautossota, seat of House Velenmepia
- **Dominant power:** Devoteo (of 5 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 1100 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 6 (1 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Skauogard** — shield, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Deiei** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Knaskdagard** — stratovolcano, active, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Hranthu** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Fjauda** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Steirnhryheim** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,459 m

## Notable features

- **Mount Vyei** — the highest peak
- **The Semi** — the greatest river
- **Lake Viacora** — the largest inland water

- Akha is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Poposia is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Nianata.
- Thoskbreivik is an inland reach of snowbound heights, its folk hardy and sea-wise.
- Bodau is a coast of windswept scrub, its folk hardy and sea-wise, seat of Gruskbu.

## Notable figures

- **Cadiariale, the Scholar** — Cadiariale mapped the waters of Viacora.
- **Reore, the Mountaineer** — Reore was first to stand atop Vyei and return alive.
- **Cosa, the Heretic** — Cosa was exiled from Bautossota for denying the old gods.
- **Cidessobia, the General** — Cidessobia broke the long siege of Bautossota.
- **Laderauvento, the Architect** — Laderauvento raised the great road between Bautossota and Nianata.

- **Aunellavi** (town) — founded 210, stormed and left a ruin in 350

## Faiths

### the Cult of Kimuma — Kimuma, god of War

> Kimuma forged the first blade in the fires of Vyei and gave it to the bold of Akha.

Followed across 10 region(s).

### the Faith of Iaronteia — Iaronteia, god of the Sea

> In the first age the waters covered all, until Iaronteia drew up the land and set the Semi running to the sea.

Followed across 10 region(s).

### the Rite of Hragrknyvik — Hragrknyvik, god of the Forest

> Hragrknyvik planted the first tree in Thoskbreivik and hides still among the deep woods.

Followed across 7 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Horses, Grain, Wine, Fish
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Bassoleda
- **Trade hubs:** Bassoleda, Kazkhu
- **Deposits:** Iron ×23, Copper ×15, Gold ×10, Gems ×6, Stone ×45, Coal ×13, Timber ×6, Grain ×26, Livestock ×101, Fish ×11, Furs ×1, Spices ×1, Salt ×8, Horses ×33, Wine ×15

## Legends of the founding age

- **58 After Reckoning** — The city of Bautossota was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **72 After Reckoning** — The city of Nianata was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **72 After Reckoning** — Bautossota rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Devoteo was proclaimed.
- **103 After Reckoning** — Nianata rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Taunabi was proclaimed.
- **793 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Bautossota; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **946 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Viacora gathered the age's finest cartographers.
- **954 After Reckoning** — Vyei woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **990 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Bautossota flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.

| Devoteo | 100 | 9 | 550 | 8 | ascendant |

| Khazze | 150 | 5 | 425 | 0 | extinct |
| Bafjyheim | 350 | 3 | 350 | 0 | extinct |
| Durkstoyvik | 600 | 3 | 600 | 3 | ascendant |

## Heightmap

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). Import it into Blender, Unity, Godot, or World Machine and scale the height to **4,500 m** (value 65535 = 4,500 m above the lowest point). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
